infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: U&Me syncs your shared plans with your device calendar so you never miss a moment.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: U&Me needs full calendar access to create, update and sync your shared events directly to your device calendar.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsWriteOnlyAccessUsageDescripti: U&Me needs calendar write access to add your shared plans to your device calendar.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: U&Me creates reminders to keep you and your partner in sync before important plans.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: U&Me lets you attach memories and photos to your shared events and moments.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: U&Me saves your couple wallpapers and shared card images to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: U&Me uses your location to suggest nearby date ideas and venues.

plugins.calendarPermission: U&Me syncs your shared plans with your device calendar so you never miss a moment.
